title: Family Movie Night Turns Into a Documentary Marathon

sentences.en: Friday is officially family movie night, though tonight's plan quietly turned into something else entirely.
sentences.zh: 星期五正式是我們家的電影夜，不過今晚的計畫悄悄變成了完全不同的東西。

sentences.en: We turned on the television expecting a normal film, but Dad accidentally clicked on a museum documentary program instead.
sentences.zh: 我們打開電視原本是想看普通電影，結果爸爸不小心點到一個博物館紀錄片節目。

sentences.en: "Pardon me," Dad said, reaching for the remote, but Sophia insisted we watch the whole thing since it looked interesting.
sentences.zh: 「不好意思，」爸爸說著伸手要拿遙控器，但 Sophia 堅持要看完整部，因為看起來很有趣。

sentences.en: The documentary was actually an interview with a museum worker who explained how old paintings get carefully repaired online and in real life.
sentences.zh: 這部紀錄片其實是一段對博物館員工的訪問，他解釋古老的畫作怎麼在線上跟現實中被小心修復。

sentences.en: William got bored halfway through and asked if we could switch back to a movie with actual action instead of "talking about paint."
sentences.zh: William 看到一半就無聊了，問能不能換回一部有真正動作場面的電影，而不是「講油漆的事」。

sentences.en: We finally agreed on an old movie about teenagers going on a strange journey, which even Sophia admitted was a strangely funny sight.
sentences.zh: 我們最後同意看一部關於青少年展開一段奇怪旅程的舊電影，連 Sophia 都承認那畫面莫名地好笑。

sentences.en: During the movie, William kept asking questions like a live radio host giving commentary the entire time.
sentences.zh: 電影播放期間，William 一直發問，整場都像個現場廣播主持人在做評論一樣。

sentences.en: One of the teenagers in the film wrote long emails to a pen pal in another country, which reminded me a little of my own letter project.
sentences.zh: 電影裡一個青少年寫了很長的電子郵件給另一個國家的筆友，這讓我想起自己的寫信計畫。

sentences.en: Bernice, who joined us for the movie, said in some countries, students her age are actually called "pupils" instead of students.
sentences.zh: 跟我們一起看電影的 Bernice 說，在有些國家，跟她一樣年紀的學生其實被稱為「pupils」而不是 students。

sentences.en: William found that fact hilarious and spent the rest of the night calling all of us "pupils" in a fake serious voice.
sentences.zh: William 覺得這件事超好笑，接下來整晚都用一種假裝正經的聲音叫我們大家「pupils」。

sentences.en: By the end of the night, we had watched one documentary and one movie, eaten an entire bowl of popcorn, and somehow gone slightly off schedule the whole time.
sentences.zh: 整晚結束時，我們看了一部紀錄片跟一部電影，吃掉了一整碗爆米花，而且整晚時間表莫名地一直亂掉。

sentences.en: Sophia said the best family movie nights are exactly like this one: a little chaotic, a little educational, and never quite going as planned.
sentences.zh: Sophia 說最棒的家庭電影夜就是像今晚這樣：有點混亂、有點長知識，而且從來不會照計畫進行。

quiz.question: What program does Dad accidentally turn on first?
What does Bernice say students are called in some countries?
What does William do after learning the word "pupils"?
options: Calls everyone "pupils" in a fake serious voice all night.
Refuses to say the word again.
Writes it down in a notebook.
Asks to go to school in another country.
